angle: Vision: category-building / policy (Kirstin Hunter Denholm-report quote)
hook_type: Caples Why + named CEO + verified number (137,000) into the policy-vision quote
tactic: Why-Kirstin policy hook -> verbatim Kirstin Denholm-report quote -> that is why we are raising -> waitlist
primary_text:
Why does Kirstin Hunter say the next 137,000 investors change everything?

"When retail investors, not just wholesale investors and VCs, can back the next generation of Australian deeptech, medtech, and cleantech companies we get a richer, more resilient innovation ecosystem."

Kirstin Hunter, CEO, Birchal.

That is why we are opening our own crowd-sourced funding offer. You read the offer document first, the day it goes live.

Leave your email and we will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Why the next 137,000 investors matter
description: The category vision, in the CEO's words. Leave your email.
_source_label: DRC V5c -- VIS4 Vision / category-building policy (Kirstin Denholm, existing investors)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V5-W set (waitlist regime). New V5c structure: 4 angles x 4 hook-distinct variants under learnings-meta-ad.md #5 + Generation prompt addendum (one idea per sentence, ONE number then a turn, reader is subject at the turn and CTA, literal email micro-action CTA per WAITLIST-CTA 2026-05-18).
_v5c_rationale: One of 4 hook-distinct variants in its angle; the hook (first 1-2 sentences) is the primary differentiator, body adapted to fit the hook (JB-permitted 2026-05-18).

Built to the learnings-meta-ad.md #5 / Generation prompt addendum 8 structural gates: opens with ONE verified number (or Caples Why on a verified number) as a complete sentence, full stop, then a turn; the reader is the grammatical subject at the turn and the CTA; no third-party company names in the bridge; plain concrete nouns; one proof point per beat; CTA = literal email micro-action with the exchange; verbatim CSF warning byte-exact terminator.

CTA field is the WAITLIST-CTA approved verbatim 'Save my spot' (landing-page canonical button); the in-copy close uses the 2026-05-18 JB-preferred literal email micro-action 'Leave your email and we will tell you the moment the offer goes live' (FMTH top-performer pattern, CSF-clean notification framing).
Strict WAITLIST regime: Birchal's own CSF offer is not live until 26 June 2026 (OFFER-CONTEXT). No transaction verbs, no $ minimum, no preferential-terms framing. Pre-offer compliant.
_drc_audience: B2C considered, most-aware. Existing Birchal investors who think in capital-markets-category terms, not just one raise.
_compliance_findings_resolved: QUOTE-009: Kirstin Hunter ad_safe_text pasted BYTE-EXACT (en-dashes converted to commas in the facts.json store, contiguous span), attributed 'Kirstin Hunter, CEO, Birchal'. Banned AI-tell 'ecosystem' appears ONLY inside this attributed verbatim (documented facts.json QUOTE-009 exemption); zero leak into surrounding prose (humaniser-confirmed).

PREOFFER-VERBS: 'Leave your email', 'we will tell you the moment', 'read the offer document first'. No transaction verbs. 'can back the next generation' is inside Kirstin's attributed verbatim, not a reader CTA.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
Policy/vision only: QUOTE-009 licenses NO numeric / market-share / #1 / first claim; body states none beyond the verified spine (137,000=PLAT-003).
Subject discipline: one 'Birchal' inside the attributed quote attribution ('Kirstin Hunter, CEO, Birchal'); first-person we/our otherwise.
